creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rm
Date: Tue Nov 29 04:37:21 UTC 2016
New revision: 427354
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/427354

Log:
  devel/py-phpserialize: update to 1.3

  - switch to pypi (old upstream url seems dead)
  - trim categories a bit
  - define LICENSE (BSD3C, confirmed with upstream developer)
  - add NO_ARCH and define supported python versions range
  - general clean-up

  PR:		214310
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (14 days)

  head/devel/py-phpserialize/Makefile
  head/devel/py-phpserialize/distinfo
  head/devel/py-phpserialize/files/
  head/devel/py-phpserialize/pkg-descr
